activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.
command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Review renewal risk for Northstar Labs due to a champion change and usage drop, requiring procurement timing clarification.

surface.heading: Renewal Risk Review

selected.request: Renewal risk review before the account planning meeting.
evidence: Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.
Primary champion left the account last month.
Procurement timeline is missing before escalation.
selected.policy: Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear; missing procurement dates should be resolved before committing a save plan.

evidence: Usage dropped 28 percent over the last two reporting periods.
Primary champion left the account last month.
Procurement timeline is missing before escalation.
surface.policy: Executive escalation is appropriate when sponsor risk and renewal timing are clear; missing procurement dates should be resolved before committing a save plan.

handoff.title: Renewal handoff
handoff.reason: Champion changed and usage dropped, but procurement timing is missing.
